title: Notes bundle live/default ownership decision and media-cleanup boundary

decision.simple_explanation: Go can exercise the notes bundle on copied DBs, but live/default ownership also has to own note deletion file cleanup and rollback evidence.
decision.reason: B-next.1 intentionally stayed local/copied-DB only, while current Python notes delete and batch delete still call _cleanup_note_images before DB deletion.

behavior_that_blocks_promotion: Extract /static/uploads/ image references from note content and cover_image
Skip deletion when another note still references the same image path
Remove original images and matching _thumb.webp companions when safe
media_cleanup_boundary.simple_explanation: Deleting a note can delete or preserve upload files based on cross-note references; copied-DB parity alone cannot prove that filesystem side effect is safe.

why_not_promoted.simple_explanation: B-next.1 was verified against copied DBs and default-disabled Go routes, not the normal live app path.
Single and batch note deletion still rely on Python cleanup code to mutate uploads safely.
No Pi, Caddy, systemd, frontend default, production DB, or rollback gate was authorized by B-next.2.

why_not_promoted.reason: Security and routing policy not promoted
why_not_promoted.simple_explanation: CSRF/origin/live route policy remains part of a future controlled rollout decision, not this copied-DB candidate.

reason_no_new_detail: The user explicitly requested no infinite detail expansion; B-next.2 closes the notes bundle promotion decision and the final B closure stops the automatic B-next chain.

remaining_no_python_gap_classes_closed_a.simple_explanation: Create/delete/merge behavior can change user-visible taxonomy and must be owned or explicitly retained.
Uploads, attachments, delete, and cleanup mutate files as well as DB rows.
Import/export moves user data across DB, Markdown, attachments, and zip output.
A no-Python package still needs a clear owner for schema versioning and DB maintenance.
Packaged default routing and rollback must be proven before Python can stop being the normal owner.

not_authorized_by_b_next_2: Promote Go notes bundle to live/default owner
Change systemd unit or service owner
Start C. Go packaged runtime release candidate
Start D. Live cutover and rollback proof
